reviews.comment:
La super mejor antencion del chicos que trbajan ahi, muy buena la calidad del servicio.Lastima los baños como siempre los de afuera un ASCO UNA VERGUENZA y los baños de los socios del ACA LIMPIOS ADENTRO.Los baños deben estar todos limpios por igual o modifiquen los baños.

(Translated by Google)
The staff there provided excellent service, and the quality of service was very good. It's a shame about the bathrooms; as always, the ones outside are disgusting and shameful, while the ACA members' bathrooms inside are spotless. All the bathrooms should be equally clean, or they should be renovated.
